Okay, welcome back. So in this lesson we are going to go over a few coaching techniques that you can use along your journey of unpacking the situational gestalt. So we're going to introduce those and we're gonna dive deeper into the first one which is presence. So here are the five we're gonna be exploring in this lesson and beyond it we're gonna talk about presence and so much is healed just through this alone. We're gonna talk about deep questioning and how to unpack certain layers where you actually want them to arrive as much as possible to their own diagnosis through your gifting of the right questions. We're gonna talk about the concept of compassionate challenging how to challenge someone into a different reality without the judgment that often comes least within it. We're gonna talk about invitational reframing where you actually want them to come to their own insight instead of you imposing and suggesting and layering your own reframes on top of their reality which just doesn't stick right because it's not of their own and then we're gonna talk about dynamic pacing and state shifters. So these are the techniques we're gonna talk about throughout the rest of the module but we are going to begin really at the most foundational which is presence. You know so presence includes quite a bit and includes deep listening and investing attention and awareness on not only the words that are being spoken the content but the underlying energy intent feeling assumptions and insinuations beneath it so the subtext the context what's actually holding and what the actual words are indicative of right because words in of themselves don't necessarily always say a whole lot right it's how it is said it is the energy in which it is being expressed from right there's a big difference between yeah I think I'm on the right track versus yeah I'm on the right track I'm actually doing pretty awesome and things are moving along right same words very different tonality very different energy and presence is what allows you to actually tune in to the underlying intent energy feeling assumptions and truthfulness beneath what is being said so presence is what allows you to attune to what is being expressed within the situational gestalt and where it lands within that spectrum and with that known with that attuned to that is where you are able to respond most skillfully right if you can't discern where they're landing within that spectrum of being empowered or disempowered or being caught within you know the stickier parts the more disempowered parts of that spectrum you're not going to be able to guide them effectively on to the more positive pull of it so it's also where the shift towards that positive polarity begins right having concerns fears projections expressed into this open container of presence and awareness is actually in of itself a form of release and catharsis this is really where healing begins where that shift towards the positive polarity really begins to take hold right if you remain present and by present I don't mean you know your typical partner or parent saying be more present no we're not talking about that that that meaning non-judgmental or reactionary to what's that what's being said right don't respond with oh that sucks oh that must be really hard right that's projecting your own idea on to it but if you remain present abiding non judgmental non-reactionary in your presence to what is being said the charge of what is being said has nothing to validate it or amplify it or feed into it or latch onto it making it a discharge that creates the opportunity in room for more epiphany more insight and a movement towards that more positive pull so present it is a form a powerful form of silent coaching that creates spaciousness for resolution and insight to reveal itself it allows for total open non-judgmental space for your prospect to express themselves into presence refuses the temptation or the urge to judge even on a mental level where you're evaluating them and judging what's being said presence just creates that open space for it to be expressed into it won't honor or validate their falsehoods verbally right I won't say oh that sucks so we're also refusing the knee-jerk impulse to sympathize sympathize in ways that props up this victimized version of them right and disempowers them further right by reinforcing this idea of it being shitty and sucky and that must be really bad that must be really hard we're actually disempowering them instead of empowering them to show them well yeah look it looks like you've actually made some movement beyond this is this true right you're actually on this call right now that is a positive step so presence won't give into that by sympathizing or validating falsehoods it also won't add to the story or project your own experience onto it you're going to hear it mutually without layering your own experience into it or imposing your own experience onto it and in doing so it takes your own ego out of it and your own need and desire to perform by hijacking the space and dropping wisdom bombs like Tony Robbins light right this isn't your performance space presence isn't about you performing it's about you once again being that open container for things to be expressed into for you to attune and receive and understand the totality of what your prospect is actually experiencing and know how to guide them to the positive aspect of that pole so presence has no agenda other than to create that container that transforms all content placed within it so here's an exercise you can do it's called perceiving from the heart space and this might be something you do initially alone I don't necessarily recommend you just drop in and do this on your next sales call I would do it alone then I would do it you know with someone you're in a relationship right right in a relationship with sorry even if it's just a pet right so what you want to do is practice perceiving from your heart space that means listening from your heart drop awareness into your heart space and imagine that your hearing senses aren't your ears on your head but you're actually hearing from your heart don't worry about it making sense just intend and resolve to attempt to do it see from your heart likewise imagine looking around the room looking at a beautiful view looking at the surroundings around you and seeing it from your eye from your heart almost as if your eyes are in your heart same thing smell a flower from your heart smell your morning coffee from your heart and you'll start to notice just how much you can feel from your heart space alone and how much you can perceive around your environment of sounds of words of the feeling behind them just from your heart space so you can even touch and feel from your heart look at an object in front of you even if it's just a book or a pair of headphones or your iPad and just imagine what it would be like to touch it with your heart and extend your ability to touch and feel things from your heart space then finally receive insight from your heart so many of us receive or try to give advice from a space of you know the intellect and the mental right and sometimes there's good wisdom there but most of the time it just kind of falls flat because it hasn't actually tuned in to the true feeling behind what is being said there's a lot more wisdom once we actually perceive the situation accurately there's a lot more wisdom in responding to the situation more accurately because we've perceived it from the heart space so it's okay if this sounds a little bit esoteric at first all I ask is that you give it a practice give it a practice right now touch something that you see with your heart smell something in the room from your heart listen to the music on Spotify from your heart and gradually you'll begin to really tune into and awaken how much can be sensed and perceived from this space and this is what you are going to eventually want to intend to bring more of on to your enrollment calls right to listen to the words your prospect is speaking from the presence in your heart that has no judgment that has no memory of oh I experienced this two years ago let me project my own experience onto it it is actually just much faster and more transformative of a container when you can presence from the heart so give it a try even if you feel that sounds ridiculous and way too esoteric I encourage you to give it a go and allow yourself to be surprised by just how much you might be able to perceive and feel from that space so with all that said take a breather and I'll meet you in the next lesson I'll see you there
